auth_login_subtitle: Enter your credentials to access inspections, reports, and team tools.
auth_login_error_2fa_unsupported: 2FA is not yet supported in the new frontend.
auth_login_error_no_token: Authentication succeeded but no token received
auth_login_error_network: Network error — is the API server running?
auth_validation_password_min8: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth_validation_password_uppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
auth_validation_password_number: Must contain at least one number
auth_validation_password_special: Must contain at least one special character
auth_validation_setup_code_min: Setup code must be at least 6 characters
auth_validation_password_min12: Password must be at least 12 characters
auth_password_hint: At least 8 characters, with an uppercase letter, a number, and a special character.
auth_forgot_sent_subtitle_suffix: , we've sent a password reset link.
auth_forgot_sent_expiry_note: The link expires in 1 hour. Check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive.
auth_forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth_reset_error_invalid_link: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
auth_reset_done_subtitle: You can now log in with your new password.
auth_join_error_accept_failed: Could not accept invite. The link may have expired.
auth_join_subtitle_invited_as: You have been invited as {email}. Set your name and password to get started.
auth_join_subtitle_invited: You have been invited. Set your name and password to get started.
auth_setup_error_failed: Setup failed. Please check your inputs.
auth_setup_error_no_session: Setup succeeded but no session was created
auth_setup_subtitle: Create the first admin account and configure your inspection company.
auth_setup_name_help: Shown on your public booking link, signed agreements, and invoices.
auth_setup_code_help_middle: secret. Don't have one yet? Add it to this Worker in the Cloudflare dashboard under
auth_agent_invite_unavailable_body: This invite link is expired, already used, or invalid.
auth_agent_invite_body_rest: has invited you to be a partner agent. See every inspection your inspectors complete for the clients you refer.
auth_agent_invite_prop1_sub: See reports the moment they're ready
auth_agent_invite_prop3_sub: No fees, no card on file
auth_agent_invite_footer_note: By accepting you agree to receive notifications when your referrals are inspected. You can unsubscribe at any time.
auth_agent_signup_error_conflict: That email is already registered. Log in instead.
auth_agent_signup_prop1_text: One dashboard, every inspector you work with.
auth_agent_signup_prop2_text: Calendar feeds keep the dates your inspectors are open in your own calendar app.
auth_agent_signup_prop3_text: No fees, no card on file. Your inspectors pay for the platform.
auth_agent_signup_panel_text: The free way for real-estate agents to track every inspection their inspectors completed for clients they referred.
auth_agent_signup_form_subtitle: Takes about a minute. Already invited? Use the link in your email instead -- it pre-fills the right tenant.
auth_agent_login_subtitle: Sign in to see referrals, reports, and inspector availability.
auth_agent_login_error_no_session: Authentication succeeded but no session was created
auth_agent_login_link_cta: Email me a sign-in link instead
auth_agent_login_link_sent_subtitle: If an agent account exists for that email, we've sent a sign-in link.
auth_agent_login_link_sent_note: The link expires in 15 minutes and can only be used once.
